item.text: I’ll keep the deck tempo simple with Zap, then use the board turn to remove P2’s damaged raider while expanding onto nearby centers.

item.command:
/bin/zsh -lc 'set -euo pipefail
RUN=.games/e024-codex-rush-vs-engine-guided
cat > "$RUN/actions/turn-005.deck.json" <<'"'JSON'
{\"schemaVersion\":1,\"turnId\":\"turn-005\",\"player\":\"P1\",\"actions\":[{\"type\":\"playAction\",\"handIndex\":2},{\"type\":\"moveToBuy\"},{\"type\":\"endTurn\"}]}
JSON
bun run --silent cli -- deck-turn --config rulesets/territory-v1-cost6-damagecap-responsewin-lead4-highmove-center6/deck.yaml --state \""'$RUN/deck.json" --actions "$RUN/actions/turn-005.deck.json" --result "$RUN/results/turn-005.deck.result.json"
cat > "$RUN/actions/turn-005.board.json" <<'"'JSON'
{\"schemaVersion\":1,\"turnId\":\"turn-005\",\"player\":\"P1\",\"actions\":{\"movements\":[{\"unit\":\"P1-raider-start-1\",\"from\":{\"col\":5,\"row\":3},\"to\":{\"col\":3,\"row\":3}},{\"unit\":\"P1-scout-start-2\",\"from\":{\"col\":6,\"row\":5},\"to\":{\"col\":8,\"row\":6}},{\"unit\":\"P1-raider-start-3\",\"from\":{\"col\":7,\"row\":5},\"to\":{\"col\":6,\"row\":5}},{\"unit\":\"P1-marksman-start-4\",\"from\":{\"col\":8,\"row\":3},\"to\":{\"col\":7,\"row\":4}}],\"recruits\":[],\"attacks\":[{\"attacker\":\"P1-raider-start-3\",\"target\":\"P2-raider-start-1\",\"deckDamage\":0}],\"heals\":[],\"upgrades\":[]}}
JSON
bun run --silent cli -- board-turn --state \""'$RUN/board.json" --deck-result "$RUN/results/turn-005.deck.result.json" --actions "$RUN/actions/turn-005.board.json" --result "$RUN/results/turn-005.board.result.json"
bun run --silent playtest -- commit-turn --run "$RUN" --deck-result "$RUN/results/turn-005.deck.result.json" --board-result "$RUN/results/turn-005.board.result.json" --summary "P1 played Zap, expanded onto additional centers, and used the forward raider to finish P2'"'s damaged raider.\" --reasoning \"RUSH plan: keep tempo with Zap instead of trashing, take the northwest and east centers while maintaining the middle, and remove P2's closest raider before it can trade into P1's damaged scout.\" --strict-win
bun run --silent validate-run -- --strict --strict-deck --strict-win \""'$RUN/timeline.json"
printf '"'\\nDECK_FILE\\n'
jq -c '.' \""'$RUN/results/turn-005.deck.result.json"
printf '"'BOARD_FILE\\n'
jq -c '.' \""'$RUN/results/turn-005.board.result.json"'

/bin/zsh -lc 'set -euo pipefail
RUN=.games/e024-codex-rush-vs-engine-guided
cat > "$RUN/actions/turn-005.deck.json" <<'"'JSON'
{\"schemaVersion\":1,\"turnId\":\"turn-005\",\"player\":\"P1\",\"actions\":[{\"type\":\"playAction\",\"handIndex\":2},{\"type\":\"moveToBuy\"},{\"type\":\"endTurn\"}]}
JSON
bun run --silent cli -- deck-turn --config rulesets/territory-v1-cost6-damagecap-responsewin-lead4-highmove-center6/deck.yaml --state \""'$RUN/deck.json" --actions "$RUN/actions/turn-005.deck.json" --result "$RUN/results/turn-005.deck.result.json"
cat > "$RUN/actions/turn-005.board.json" <<'"'JSON'
{\"schemaVersion\":1,\"turnId\":\"turn-005\",\"player\":\"P1\",\"actions\":{\"movements\":[{\"unit\":\"P1-raider-start-1\",\"from\":{\"col\":5,\"row\":3},\"to\":{\"col\":3,\"row\":3}},{\"unit\":\"P1-scout-start-2\",\"from\":{\"col\":6,\"row\":5},\"to\":{\"col\":8,\"row\":6}},{\"unit\":\"P1-raider-start-3\",\"from\":{\"col\":7,\"row\":5},\"to\":{\"col\":6,\"row\":5}},{\"unit\":\"P1-marksman-start-4\",\"from\":{\"col\":8,\"row\":3},\"to\":{\"col\":7,\"row\":4}}],\"recruits\":[],\"attacks\":[{\"attacker\":\"P1-raider-start-3\",\"target\":\"P2-raider-start-1\",\"deckDamage\":0}],\"heals\":[],\"upgrades\":[]}}
JSON
bun run --silent cli -- board-turn --state \""'$RUN/board.json" --deck-result "$RUN/results/turn-005.deck.result.json" --actions "$RUN/actions/turn-005.board.json" --result "$RUN/results/turn-005.board.result.json"
bun run --silent playtest -- commit-turn --run "$RUN" --deck-result "$RUN/results/turn-005.deck.result.json" --board-result "$RUN/results/turn-005.board.result.json" --summary "P1 played Zap, expanded onto additional centers, and used the forward raider to finish P2'"'s damaged raider.\" --reasoning \"RUSH plan: keep tempo with Zap instead of trashing, take the northwest and east centers while maintaining the middle, and remove P2's closest raider before it can trade into P1's damaged scout.\" --strict-win
bun run --silent validate-run -- --strict --strict-deck --strict-win \""'$RUN/timeline.json"
printf '"'\\nDECK_FILE\\n'
jq -c '.' \""'$RUN/results/turn-005.deck.result.json"
printf '"'BOARD_FILE\\n'
jq -c '.' \""'$RUN/results/turn-005.board.result.json"'

item.text:
Committed and validated `turn-005`.

Deck line: played `zap`, moved to buy, ended turn. Bought nothing. Produced `6` money and `1` damage.

Board line: raider moved to `(3,3)`, scout to `(8,6)`, raider to `(6,5)`, marksman to `(7,4)`. `P1-raider-start-3` attacked and removed `P2-raider-start-1`.

Rationale: this keeps tempo with Zap, expands P1 center control, protects the damaged scout by moving it onto `center-east`, and removes P2’s closest high-damage threat. Strict validation passed.
